subcodes.first_line: O servant of Truth! The contents of thy plaint-laden letter have become known, and have occasioned the utmost astonishment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غلام حق بر مضمون شکایت مشحون مکتوب اطلاع حاصل گردید نهایت استغراب حاصل چه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
